pathAssistantSteps.info: Account number assigned. Configure IBANs and bank accounts in the Bank Accounts related list. Send the confirmation letter to the client. Use the Confirm Go Live button when all three conditions are met.
Compliance review in progress. Once KYC is verified and risk rating assigned, use the Approve and Assign Client Code button to assign the client code and move to Client Coded.
Account closed. Record retained for audit trail. Closure reason and date are documented above.
Initial enquiry received. Schedule an intro call and capture the client source and referring partner if applicable. Send the onboarding form link when ready to proceed.
Active engagement underway. Client requirements understood. Send the onboarding application form link to the client. Add required documents to the Document Checklist.
All documents received. Compliance team must review KYC documents via Allpass and complete the formal sign-off using the Compliance Sign-Off button.
Document request sent. We can only move to Paperwork Received once ALL requested documents have been collected and marked as Received or Waived in the Document Checklist.
Client is live and actively trading. Monitor trade volume and ensure periodic review dates are met. Use the Close Account button if the account needs to be closed.
